name: p31-meatspace-bonding
description: BONDING — real-world social game. Humans are atoms, relationships are chemical bonds.

scripts.build:planes: pnpm build:k4-ui && pnpm build:onboarding-module && pnpm --filter @meatspace/delta-ignition build && pnpm --filter @meatspace/trim-sequence build && pnpm --filter @meatspace/fleet-status build
scripts.build: pnpm build:k4-ui && pnpm build:onboarding && pnpm --filter @meatspace/server build && pnpm --filter @meatspace/mobile build
scripts.build:all: pnpm build:k4-ui && pnpm build:onboarding && pnpm --filter @meatspace/server build && pnpm --filter @meatspace/mobile build && pnpm build:planes && pnpm build:onboarding-module
scripts.deploy:delta-ignition: pnpm build:k4-ui && wrangler pages project create delta-ignition --production-name delta-ignition && wrangler pages deploy apps/delta-ignition/dist --project-name delta-ignition --branch master
scripts.deploy:trim-sequence: pnpm build:k4-ui && wrangler pages project create trim-sequence --production-name trim-sequence && wrangler pages deploy apps/trim-sequence/dist --project-name trim-sequence --branch master
scripts.deploy:fleet-status: pnpm build:k4-ui && wrangler pages project create fleet-status --production-name fleet-status && wrangler pages deploy apps/fleet-status/dist --project-name fleet-status --branch master
scripts.deploy:planes: pnpm deploy:delta-ignition && pnpm deploy:trim-sequence && pnpm deploy:fleet-status
scripts.deploy:onboarding: pnpm build:onboarding && wrangler pages deploy apps/onboarding/dist --project-name bonding-meatspace --branch master
scripts.deploy:onboarding-module: pnpm build:onboarding-module && wrangler pages deploy apps/onboarding-module/dist --project-name onboarding-module --branch master
scripts.deploy:server: git push origin master  # triggers auto-deploy on Render/Railway
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm deploy:planes && pnpm deploy:onboarding && pnpm build:onboarding-module && pnpm deploy:onboarding-module && echo '✓ All projects deployed'
scripts.setup: pnpm install && docker compose up -d && pnpm --filter @meatspace/server db:migrate && pnpm --filter @meatspace/server db:seed
